title: thymus serpyllum var. gaviolii
intro: Thymus serpyllum var. gaviolii, also known as wild thyme, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of wild thyme include relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, reducing stress and anxiety, and aiding in digestion. Wild thyme can be prepared through herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
